chosen_action.title: Upgrade README, START_HERE, and docs map for faster first-run conversion

why_this_action.summary: Conversion from interest to free use is the current bottleneck, and the strongest executable move right now is to sharpen the primary repo's first-run path while external outreach lanes are either saturated or inside active measurement windows.

verification: Local link resolution check passed for updated conversion surfaces
Git diff inspected for README.md, START_HERE.md, and docs/README.md

expected_outcome: A clearer Codeberg-first first-run path that turns more repo visitors into real evaluators and increases the odds of stars, watches, useful issues, or repeat use.

measurement_window.success_metric: Any Codeberg adoption delta or higher-quality first-run feedback attributable to the stronger conversion surfaces.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If Codeberg remains flat through the next review window, treat this docs upgrade as insufficient alone and pair the next run with a new high-intent demand-capture or citation lane.
